Welcome to Otrebla's Tailoring, your premier destination for Full-service custom tailoring & haberdashery, tuxedo rentals.

What sets us apart: One of the last true bench tailors - high-end craftsmanship

Visit us today and experience the quality that has made us a local favorite.

Otrebla's Tailoring - Quality Service, Every Time.
